specialized_cip_replacement_cost_usd.rationale: Risk 3 projects 25% inflation of specialized Northern labor costs over 24 months with a 2:1 replacement buffer; wide range reflects unknown CIP swap volume and contract-rate dispersion.

legacy_system_monthly_maintenance_cost_u.rationale: Risk 6 names a $500B+ annual shortfall from legacy maintenance drain (~$42B/month); base set near that figure with wide spread for unknown contract scope and liability-cap design.

infrastructure_transfer_actual_share.rationale: Risk 2 (cascading severance failure) and Risk 5 (corridor bottlenecks) jointly drive a wide miss vs the 90% IOB-dissolution target; base just below target reflects realistic slip.

wave1_verification_actual_share.rationale: Wave 1 is the highest-sync-risk severance window (premortem top operational risk); base set below the 85% trigger to reflect a realistic sequencing miss requiring grace-period extension.

northern_hub_projected_density_persons_p.rationale: Q7 requires sanitation/medical resources for 175% of currently settled population; base sits at the 13,000 design-suspension cap, with the upper tail crossing the 15,000 humane-mandate ceiling.

northern_density_cap_persons_per_km2.rationale: Plan names two caps: 13,000 design-suspension (conservative modelling) and 15,000 humane-mandate (absolute breach); spread reflects sensitivity to which cap downstream commitments are written against.
